title: Karyotype-catalogue IN — whole-genome catalogue, registry shape
description: JSON wrapping a long-table row list. One row per (chrom, LRR_id, sample_id, karyotype). Karyotype labels HOM1/HET/HOM2 map to PC1 bands 0/1/2. This is the contract the data registry is expected to emit when the inversion catalogue + per-sample karyotype calls become available. Forward-compatible: defined before the registry exists; the loader stays the same when the upstream producer ships.
